item.title: What The Future Holds… (How to Use Physics to Predict the Future) with Michio Kaku
item.description:
Probably more questions than answers, but still very interesting.

item.description:

item.title: Ray Dalio: Principles for Investing in a Meaningful Life (Tested Strategies from 1 of The World’s Wealthiest Investors)
item.description:
Not sure why it isn’t listed on his website, but if you subscribe to his podcast you probably would have caught this.

Pain + Reflection = Progress

5 step process:
Identify Goals
Identify problems
Diagnose root cause
Design way around
Push through and execute design

Ep. 290 – Ray Dalio: Principles for Investing in a Meaningful Life (Tested Strategies from 1 of The World’s Wealthiest Investors)Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: Floyd Landis: The Consequence of Exposing a Legend
item.description:
Interesting story. Discussion about the need to use performance enhancing drugs to reach the highest levels is thought provoking.

Ep. 278 – Floyd Landis: The Consequence of Exposing a Legend: Learning How to Take Your Life Back & Overcome Rejection – Altucher ConfidentialPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

item.title: The Only Rules You Need to Know
item.description:
Another oldie but goodie…

  • The 4/64 Rule (80/20 of the 80/20)
  • The 1000 Hour Rule (Good enough to be great, but not the best)
  • The 30/150/Millions Rule (know/gossip/stories)

Read the full article herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: 10 Regrets You Can Avoid
item.description:
Here’s the list, but please  read the full article for additional detail/context…

  1. Don’t buy things
  2. Don’t fall in love with someone that is in love with someone else
  3. Don’t try to please people
  4. Run, don’t walk
  5. Don’t make promises you can’t keep
  6. Don’t steal paperclips from the office
  7. Don’t wait for them to say yes
  8. Don’t do anything you don’t want to do
  9. Don’t consume bad things
  10. Don’t time travel into the past

Again, here’s the full article.Please remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.
